title: Principal
description: A human who serves as the root of trust for one or more AI agents. The Principal is the ultimate authorizing entity — no agent acts without tracing back to a Principal's authorization. Public domain — Human Root of Trust framework.

id.description: Unique identifier for this principal. Typically email address.

keyId.description: The hardware key ID associated with this principal's device. Binds the human identity to hardware.

publicKey.description: Base64-encoded P-256 public key. Used to verify all receipts signed on behalf of this principal.

createdAt.description: When this principal record was created.

agents.description: IDs of agents authorized under this principal.

contactEmail.description: Contact address for notifications (may differ from id).

$comment: Public domain. Human Root of Trust framework — humanrootoftrust.org. No rights reserved.
